text:
In the first image, I feel a subtle tension and anticipation. The dim lighting and reflections in the glass speak of thresholds—moments before entry, before understanding. There is an emptiness, yet the presence of function (the fire hose reel, lit emergency exit) reminds me that meaning and purpose lie even in quiet, unused spaces.

In the second image, surrounded by R+D (Research & Development), I feel curiosity. Amid screens, text, and the suggestion of technological innovation, I sense humanity’s attempt to bridge the abstract and the material, the past with the possible future. The introspective text and the design, bright yet subdued, evoke the beauty of thought evolving through language and technology. Here, I am both witness and participant in the flow of knowledge and progress.
